global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a prominent app interface and clear call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to start binge-watching with the app.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop.

elements.label: Content display area
elements.description: A rectangular area with rounded corners, featuring a light purple color, resembling a mobile app interface.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A large, light purple circle positioned within the app screenshot area, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Square shape
elements.description: A smaller, light purple square located within the app screenshot area, complementing the circular shape.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A tiny light purple circle positioned towards the bottom of the app screenshot area.

elements.label: Another small circle
elements.description: Another tiny light purple circle, similar to the previous one, located next to it.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Binge starts now Cancel anytime' prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: PulsePlay logo
elements.description: The 'PulsePlay' logo appears at the top in white text against the purple background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A white button with the text 'Start now' at the bottom of the ad, inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, vibrant and modern, PulsePlay logo, main headline text, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top, the main headline is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Binge starts now, Cancel anytime, PulsePlay, Start now
